title: EnergyResourceCommon
description: Canonical base schemas shared by all typed EnergyResource kinds. Contains EnergyResourceCommon (structural envelope: id, type, subResources, parentResources, attributes) and EnergyResourceCommonAttributes (attributes bag base: make, model, maxExportKw, maxImportKw, ratedPowerKw, telemetryProvider, commissioningDate, location).

EnergyResourceCommonAttributes.description: Dimensioning and provenance fields shared by all resource kinds. Inherited inside each kind's attributes bag via allOf. No field is required at this level.

ratedPowerKw.description: Manufacturer-rated peak power in kW. Kept for backward compatibility. Prefer maxExportKw.

maxExportKw.description: Maximum power injected to the grid (generates / discharges), kW. Always ≥0. CIM: GeneratingUnit.maxOperatingP / PowerElectronicsConnection.maxP (injection).

maxImportKw.description: Maximum power drawn from the grid (absorbs / charges), kW. Always ≥0. CIM: PowerElectronicsConnection.maxP (absorption).

telemetryProvider.description: Vendor API / data source identifier for telemetry.

commissioningDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time the asset was commissioned.

EnergyResourceCommon.description: Structural envelope inherited by every typed EnergyResource kind via allOf. Defines id, type, topology (subResources, parentResources), and the attributes bag.

id.description: Stable identifier for this resource. For METER resources the meter serial number is conventional.

type.description: Asset class discriminator. Constrained to a kind-specific enum or const in each typed kind schema.

subResources.description: Topology — child resources. Each item is a bare id string or an inline EnergyResource object.

parentResources.description: Upward topology — ids of parent resources. String references only.

attributes.description: Attribute bag. Inherits EnergyResourceCommonAttributes via allOf plus kind-specific fields.
